G13.note: LIVE_SHADOW — weather revalidation complete. Score-based ROI was leakage artifact. Weather-based ROI ~0-2%. Monitor live shadow vs this baseline. Do not promote based on historical backtest.
G13.composite_shadow: G13_S6_REGULAR_HARD — RETIRED. Leakage artifact — score-based wave contamination. Invalidated 2026-03-31.
G13.watchlist: G13_x_S3_HIGH_APP — SUSPENDED pending G13 revalidation. Score-based wave contamination affects S3 interaction test. Do not activate.

G14.rule: overlay_edge >= 0.02 AND tb_bucket == HIGH AND field_type == STRONG
G14.note: Weak fields excluded. Win market watchlist only.

G15.note: Top-5 stratified and Win stratified logged as watchlist only. Kill switch at 12 signals per event.

CL01.name: Cut-Line Density Effect
CL01.mechanism: When score distribution clusters densely around the cut-line threshold, boundary player probabilities become unstable and potentially mispriced
CL01.result: 95% of events have 8+ players within 1 stroke. Mean 37 players in boundary zone.

CL02.name: Cut-Line Boundary Player Mispricing
CL02.mechanism: Players just outside cut after R1 are systematically underpriced because books do not model R2 score compression at the boundary
CL02.result: Hypothesis inverted. OUTSIDE_1 overpriced (-18.9pp), not underpriced. Inverted signal found in INSIDE_1 — registered as CL03.

CL03.name: Inside-Cut R1 Undervaluation
CL03.mechanism: Players just inside the projected R1 cut line are systematically underpriced in make-cut markets. Market overstates Friday reversal risk and understates the value of already being on the correct side of the cut boundary after Round 1.
CL03.note: Backtest ROI invalid for trading — pre-R1 odds used vs post-R1 signal. Live shadow begins on next standard cut event. Promotion gate: N >= 50 live post-R1 shadow bets, ROI >= +5%, positive CLV.
